articles.title: Is Fox (FOXA) Still Worth A Look As Its $22b Roku Deal Reshapes Valuation?
articles.summary: Fox (FOXA) is back in focus after Rothschild Redburn upgraded the stock and the company agreed to acquire Roku in a US$22b deal, a move that reshapes its streaming footprint. See our latest analysis for Fox. At a latest share price of US$55.90, Fox has climbed 3.29% on a 1 day share price return, even though its 30 day share price return is down 15.11% and its year to date share price return is down 24.21%. articles.title: Can Fox (FOX) Climb 38.77% to Reach the Level Wall Street Analysts Expect?
articles.summary: The consensus price target hints at a 38.8% upside potential for Fox (FOX). While empirical research shows that this sought-after metric is hardly effective, an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean that the stock will witness an upside in the near term.

articles.title: Wall Street Analysts Believe Fox (FOXA) Could Rally 27.67%: Here's is How to Trade
articles.summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for Fox (FOXA) points to a 27.7% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
